name: threatlocker-mcp
description: MCP server for ThreatLocker Portal API - access computers, approval requests, audit logs, and organizations through AI assistants
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to your ThreatLocker Portal data. Manage computers, computer groups, approval requests, audit logs, and organizations through the Model Context Protocol. Features decision-tree navigation, elicitation prompts, and comprehensive error handling.

threatlocker_api_key.title: ThreatLocker API Key
threatlocker_api_key.description: Your ThreatLocker Portal API key (Portal -> Administrators -> API Users). Sent as the Authorization header value with no Bearer prefix.

threatlocker_organization_id.title: Managed Organization ID (optional)
threatlocker_organization_id.description: Optional. The GUID of a managed/child organization to scope every request to. Leave blank to act as the API user's primary org. Sent as the managedOrganizationId header.

threatlocker_base_url.title: Portal API base URL (optional)
threatlocker_base_url.description: Optional. Override only if your tenant lives on a non-default ThreatLocker shard. Example: https://portalapi.g.us.threatlocker.com/portalapi or https://portalapi.eu.threatlocker.com/portalapi. Find yours at https://threatlocker.kb.help/locating-your-organizations-instance/
